_meta.description: PENDING customer re-OAuth after Brand Analytics app re-submission — table will be empty until customers re-auth on the new app version. Quarterly demographics per marketplace, flattened so each row is one (dimension, bucket, percentage) tuple. Five dimensions: age_range, gender, household_income, education, marital_status.
_meta.pending_reason: Demographics requires Brand Analytics scope. SellerSheet's app re-submission is pending Amazon Appstore approval. Existing customers must re-OAuth after the new app version is live before this table contains rows.

columns.comment: Marketplace country (US, UK, DE, etc). Defaults to '_primary_' on single-mkt stores.
First day of the quarter the report covers.
Last day of the quarter the report covers.
Server-side timestamp when the row was UPSERTed.
One of: age_range, gender, household_income, education, marital_status.

Lowercased bucket label. Vocabulary by dimension (post-lowercase) — gender: 'male', 'female'. age_range: '18-24', '25-34', '35-44', '45-54', '55-64', '65+'. household_income: '$0-25k', '$25k-50k', '$50k-75k', '$75k-100k', '$100k-150k', '$150k+'. education: 'highschool', 'somecollege', 'bachelordegree', 'graduatedegree'. marital_status: 'single', 'married', 'divorced'. Filter on the lowercased form.
Fraction 0.0-1.0; sums to ~1.0 across the buckets within a single (dimension, marketplace_id, period) group.
Anything Amazon ships that isn't promoted to a typed column.
